Case# TKSmartCardPINFormat.Charset.numeric

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.11+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case numeric
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardPINFormat/Charset-swift.enum/numeric#Discussion)

PIN is only composed of digits.
